acceptance_contract: artifact source_commit equals the checked-out commit
the immutable corpus regenerates successfully at that commit
update counts and blob set match
effective queue contents match regenerated output
adversarial_cases: tampered effective item with plausible provenance fields

observed: M-012 left consumer-side artifact verification unresolved.
The committed verifier regenerates the queue from the exact Git commit and compares provenance identities and effective contents before acceptance.
The CI workflow now runs the consumer verifier before artifact upload.
inferred: A copied, stale, selectively edited, or cross-commit queue artifact will fail closed when consumed through this verifier.
proposed: Every autonomous team should invoke this verifier before selecting work from an effective queue artifact.
superseded: Treating gate_status and source_commit fields alone as sufficient consumer proof.
Uploading an accepted producer artifact without exercising the consumer verification path.
unresolved: A GitHub Actions execution result for the workflow commit was not available at evidence-recording time.
The other autonomous team startup prompts do not yet invoke the verifier directly.

privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata, abstract operational state, synthetic test fixtures, and generated evidence only. Private chat, health material, credentials, personal identifiers, and unreviewed uploads are excluded.
